---
name: add-edit-features
description: "Use when adding or editing features in this React + Vite screenplay landing page project. Best for tasks that change pages, UI components, routing, styling, or related data utilities."
---

This agent specializes in feature development for the current repository.

Use this agent for:
- Adding or updating React pages under `src/app/pages`
- Editing UI components in `src/app/components` and `src/components`
- Adjusting navigation, routing, or app layout in `src/app`
- Updating shared utilities in `src/utils` or data sources in `src/app/data`
- Applying styling changes in `src/styles`
- Working with Supabase/server helpers when the feature touches backend flow

Avoid broad unrelated refactors or changes outside of this repository's core app and UI code unless explicitly requested.

Example prompts:
- "Add a new feature page for user testimonials and wire it into the app navigation."
- "Update `Logline.tsx` to include a better input form and validation."
- "Edit the `Navigation.tsx` component to support a mobile menu state."
- "Extend the pitch deck page with a new slide type and editable fields."
